race.description: Musk Creek Farm SSS - Heat 5 Handicap (Bm66)
race.comment: ATTACHMENTS (3) is the up and running mare who will take beating again. Four runs this time in have been good, just finding one better at Sandown Hillside last time out, beaten a long neck. She'll land in a good trailing position here and take plenty of beating. MARKDEL (4) resumes. He won fresh here in a Class 1 last time in having shown good ability early days. He's got the ability to be winning this if wound up. STATICE (10) resumes. She didn't show up in one run last time in but had looked good prior to that and can do much better this time around. DON'T RUSSIA (6) struggles to win but was good last time out when beaten under a length at Caulfield Heath. She'll go forward and be in this for a long way. STREET CONQUEROR (5) is going well and has minor claims.
